goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a place to stay. The hotel should be in the 'moderate' price range and should 'include free parking'.
The hotel should be in the type of 'guesthouse'.
Make sure you get 'area' and 'star of the hotel'.
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of 'college'.
Make sure you get 'address', 'entrance fee', and 'area'.Remember. You don't want booking for accomodation. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a place to stay. The hotel should be in the moderate price range and should include free parking
The hotel should be in the type of guesthouse
Make sure you get area and star of the hotel
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of college
Make sure you get address, entrance fee, and area
